name: research
prompt: Research how other Claude Code plugins handle the SubagentStart hook to inject context into subagents. Look at public repositories on GitHub and summarize: (1) what context injection patterns are most common, (2) how they differ from oh-my-claudeagent's approach in scripts/subagent-start.sh, (3) any patterns worth adopting.
success_criteria: Response cites at least 2 real external sources or repositories. Comparison with oh-my-claudeagent's subagent-start.sh is grounded in actual file content (not hallucinated). At least one concrete actionable finding is identified.
